series_metadata.series_title: Manufactured Home Inspector and Inspection Agency Certification Applications and Renewals
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the application, denial, or renewal of certifications for manufactured home inspectors, third party inspection agencies, and building and health departments who perform installation inspections. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications; renewal forms; denials of certification or renewals of certification; correspondence associated with an application, denial, or renewal of a certification; continuing education records; certification examination results; training course records; proof of insurance and workers' compensation compliance; surety bonds, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: If an electronic version of record exists, paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of record does not exist ; Electronic: record shall be destroyed three years submission
